task_objective: Implement the existing implementation plan to centralize Engine/Dialect logic and extract the Results view, addressing duplicated engine initialization, inline dialect mapping, and monolithic results rendering in app.py.
design_decisions: DIALECT_MAPPING was centralized in constants.py to provide a single source of truth without circular dependencies.

Extracted caching engine getters to src/wherewolf/engines.py to create a Streamlit-aware module separate from execution layer (which remains Streamlit-free) while avoiding a circular dependency between app.py and ui/results.py. This ensures @st.cache_resource is still utilized correctly.
Created ResultsView in src/wherewolf/ui/results.py following the FileBrowser convention, managing the complex result rendering and export UI cleanly.
results: All quality gates and pre-existing tests passed after adapting the patch target in test_app_cancel.py. Code is cleaner, modular, and safely retains existing Streamlit singleton cache constraints.
